title: A Session With Uncle Sidney - IV - And Makes Nursery Rhymes - 2 The Imperious Angler
content:
Miss Medairy Dory-Ann
     Cast her line and caught a man,

    
     But when he looked so pleased, alack!
     She unhooked and plunked him back. - 
     "I never like to catch what I can,"
     Said Miss Medairy Dory-Ann.
meaning:
"A Session With Uncle Sidney - IV - And Makes Nursery Rhymes - 2 The Imperious Angler" is a quintessential example of James Whitcomb Riley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
